table_of_contents.title:
2.1 GHS-BUILT-S R2023A - GHS built-up surface spatial raster dataset, derived 
from Sentinel-2 composite and Landsat, multi-temporal (1975-2030)
2.1.3 Improvements compared to the previous release

2.2 GHS-BUILT-H R2023A - GHS building height, derived from AW3D30, SRTM30, 
and Sentinel-2 composite (2018)

2.3 GHS-BUILT-V R2023A - GHS built-up volume spatial raster datasets derived 
from joint assessment of Sentinel-2, Landsat, and global DEM data, for 1975-
2030 (5yrs interval)

2.4 GHS-BUILT-C R2023A - GHS Settlement Characteristics, derived from 
Sentinel-2 composite (2018) and other GHS R2023A data

2.5 GHS-POP R2023A - GHS population spatial raster dataset multi-temporal 
(1975-2030)
2.5.1 Improvements compared to the previous release

2.6 GHS-SMOD R2023A - GHS settlement layers, application of the Degree of 
Urbanisation methodology (stage I) to GHS-POP R2023A and GHS-BUILT-S 
R2023A, multitemporal (1975-2030)
2.6.1 Improvements compared to the previous release
2.6.3 GHS-SMOD L2 spatial raster dataset and L1 aggregation

2.7 GHS-DUC R2023A - GHS Degree of Urbanisation Classification, application of 
the Degree of Urbanisation methodology (stage II) to GADM 3.6 layer, 
multitemporal (1975-2030)
2.8 A consistent nomenclature for the Degree of Urbanisation
2.8.1 How to use the statistics tables

2.9 GHS-BUILT-LAUSTAT R2023A - GHS built-up surface statistics in European 
LAU, multitemporal (1975-2020)

2.10 GHS-SDATA R2023A - GHSL data supporting the production of R2023A Data 
Package (GHS-BUILT, GHS-POP)
GETTING IN TOUCH WITH THE EU
On the phone or in writing
